REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT NORTH BEACH HOTEL, LARISH BURLYGA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR, MOVING PARTY FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CCP 430.41 IN GOOD FAITH. DEFENDANT ATTEMPTED TO CONTACT PLAINTIFF ON JUNE 10, 2016, 14 DAYS AFTER THE COMPLAINT WAS FILED AND 1 DAY AFTER THE DEFENDANT WAS SERVED. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT AVAILABLE AND DEFENDANT WAS INSTRUCTED TO CALL BACK LATER. DEFENDANT EXECUTED THE CCP 430.41 DECLARATION ON JUNE 10, 2016 BEFORE ANY ATTEMPT TO CALL BACK AND FILED THIS DEMURRER, 4 DAYS LATER. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2016 Continued To Dec-28-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-25-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David Wasserman, Esq. (415-567-9600) for Defendant/opposing party North Beach Hotel.
No other Appearance.

No Argument. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT NORTH BEACH HOTEL, LARISH BURLYGA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order is signed in open court. (see scanned order for details)Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-25-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rudolph Fisher (415-335-8327) Plaintiff/Moving party in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT NORTH BEACH HOTEL, LARISH BURLYGA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, moving party failed to comply with CCP 430.41 in good faith. Defendant attempted to contact Plaintiff on June 10, 2016, 14 days after the complaint was filed and 1 day after the Defendant was served. Plaintiff was not available and Defendant was instructed to call back later. Defendant executed the CCP 430.41 declaration on June 10, 2016 before any attempt to call back and filed this demurrer, 4 days later. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
